final:
module binary_counter_with_enable (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
